event: treated for high-grade B-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma
developed from advanced follicular lymphoma through Richter’s transformation
three cycles of salvage immunochemotherapy with rituximab, ifosfamide, carboplatin, etoposide (R-ICE)
second cycle complicated by oropharyngeal mucositis
seventh day of third cycle of R-ICE
advised to go to hospital immediately
initial examination revealed signs of septic shock
changed treatment strategy to chimeric antigen receptor-T cell
